narrative_beat: Mao segura pergaminho aberto com versiculo 24:24 caligrafado em dourado gotico

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a hand holding an unrolled ancient parchment scroll with gothic gold calligraphy of verse markers
subject.focal_point: the gold calligraphic rendering of Matthew 24:24 at the center
subject.secondary: A hanging brass oil lamp casts warm light. Greek columns in shadow behind.

composition.rule: rule of thirds with scroll on right
composition.foreground: hand and parchment in warm gold tones

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: verse as fixed warning across time

negative_as_positive: photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
